en: Transcriber's Name Reviewer's Name Transcription by ESO
Transcription by ESO So this happy pic of me was taken in 1999 I was a senior in college
ko: 이 행복한 사진은 1999년에 찍었어. 그때 나는 대학 4학년이었고

en: and it was right after dance practice I was really really happy And I remember exactly where I
ko: 댄스 연습이 끝난 직후였어. 정말 정말 행복했어. 그리고 정확히 어디에 있었는지 기억해

en: was about a week and a half later I was sitting in the back of my used minivan in a campus parking
ko: 약 1주일 반 후, 캠퍼스 주차장에서 중고 미니밴 뒷자리에 앉아 있을 때

en: lot when I decided that I was going to commit suicide
And I went from deciding to a full blown planning very quickly
And I came this close to the edge of the precipice It's the closest I've ever come
ko: 나는 절벽 끝까지 거의 갔어. 내가 그렇게 가까이 간 적은 처음이야

en: And the only reason I took my finger off the trigger was thanks to a few lucky coincidences
ko: 방아쇠에서 손가락을 뗀 이유는 몇 가지 운 좋은 우연 덕분이었어

en: And after the fact that's what scared me the most the element of chance
ko: 그 후에 내가 가장 무서워했던 건 우연의 요소였어

en: So I became very methodical about testing different ways that I could manage my life
ko: 그래서 나는 내 삶을 관리할 수 있는 다양한 방법을 시험하는 데 매우 체계적이었어
